description: Feature-execution coverage map (test-quality program T1.1). Every language feature listed here must have at least one EXECUTED conformance spec (bytecode run on lib/evm), or an explicit skip reason. A feature PR must add its entry; skips are visible debt, burned down in T1.2.

features.behavior: Public function with address/uint256 args decodes calldata and executes
Constructor args are ABI-decoded at deploy and initialize storage
Dynamic string calldata arg is bounds-checked, copied, and usable
uint256[] calldata arg decodes with correct length and elements
Dynamic tuple calldata arg decodes head/tail correctly
Dynamic aggregate returns are ABI-encoded (offset/length/payload)
Dynamic string return decodes on the caller side
Error-union error path REVERTs with the 4-byte custom error selector
encode->call->decode identity for u256/i16/address/bool/bytes4/uint256[]
Non-payable by default: dispatcher REVERTs (0,0) on nonzero call value before selector dispatch; std.msg.value() reads 0 on the zero path. No payable surface yet
Contract-side @abiEncode/@abiDecode roundtrip is the identity
Scalar storage read/write with raw-slot parity
map<address,V> store/load with keccak slot parity
map<u256,V> store/load with keccak slot parity
map<string,V> store/load
map<bytesN,V> store/load
map with narrow integer key normalizes key width correctly
map<K1,map<K2,V>> double-keccak slot derivation
Triple-nested map slot derivation
Struct values under a map: field offsets within derived slot
Struct values under nested maps
Top-level storage struct field slots
Static array field inside a storage struct
Packed bitfield read/modify/write within one slot
Custom-width bitfield packing
Bitfield values under a map
Storage dynamic array push/index with length slot + keccak data root

features.skip: layout unresolved; inputs intentionally listed in tests/conformance/SKIP

features.behavior: store(slot,x) -> load(slot) == x across diverse slots
Local narrow error union: Ok and Err paths via try/unwrap/catch
Result<scalar> stored and re-read from storage
Result<string> in storage with keccak-rooted dynamic payload
Result<bytes> in storage
Result<slice> in storage
Wide (>255-bit struct) success payload through local error union; Ok paths executed. Err/catch path BLOCKED: aggregate-payload catch unpacks garbage pointer, panics lib/evm (finding 2026-06-11)

Local Result<string>: try Ok path, match extraction, tuple-from-match content executed. Err/catch path BLOCKED (same aggregate-payload catch miscompile); tuple-return-in-catch blocked at OraToSIR Phase3b (findings 2026-06-11)
Local Result with scalar payload through memref-backed locals
Local Result with opaque payload through memref-backed locals
Multi-field event (address, uint256) layout: topics vs data packing on the wire
log statement emits expected topics and ABI-encoded data
Environment builtins (sender etc.) return host-provided values
Wrapping add/sub/mul match u256 reference semantics
Signed narrow division and comparison match reference semantics

features.skip: unconstrained checked arithmetic is rejected at COMPILE time (verifier SAT -> no bytecode); belongs to the expected-diagnostic negative corpus - T1.5

features.behavior: Execution falsification (T3.4): the verified ensures(result==a+b) is checked at runtime on in-envelope boundary inputs, pairing verifier discharge with concrete execution to catch a false-UNSAT
Retained checked-add assert reverts on real overflow; CHARACTERIZATION pins: requires not boundary-enforced, discharged div-zero check removed (silent 0) - S1 finding with audit
Runtime-bound loop over slice executes correct iteration count
switch over runtime value takes each literal arm and else
MinValue/InRange refinement params: in-range args execute, violating args REVERT at the boundary guard

features.skip: BLOCKED: trait-impl methods cannot be called from contract fns at all (FINDINGS.md F-005, lowering gap) - spec ready to restore on fix

features.behavior: Monomorphized comptime-generic fn (u256 and u8 instances) driven at runtime; fully-folded call returns the comptime result
comptime const expressions fold and are observable via the ABI, alone and mixed with runtime args
Enum stored, re-read, compared; ordinal raw-slot parity

features.skip: no executed ADT payload match spec - sequenced behind adt-design phases

features.behavior: tstore.guard REVERTs an indirect write to a locked map slot at runtime; disjoint-slot write under lock succeeds
Struct with a static-array field stored under a map: array-offset within struct within map-derived slot, with raw-slot parity and key independence
Hostile raw calldata against the dispatcher decode surface (unknown selector, truncated args, out-of-bounds dynamic offset) must revert, never accept-and-misbehave
Multi-caller vault scenario over ora-example/vault/02_errors.ora: deposits, partial withdraw, per-caller balances, total, ZeroAmount and payload-carrying InsufficientBalance revert paths
Static tuple returns (uint,uint) and (uint,bool) ABI-encode correctly
